metadata.title: Premium 360° Digital Agency in Morocco
metadata.description: Mohtaoua — digital, creative and technology agency in Morocco. Marketing, web development, software, mobile, design, AI, automation and events for every industry.

footer.description: Mohtaoua is a premium 360° digital agency in Morocco: marketing, technology, design, automation and AI for businesses across all industries.

hero.title: Your <highlight>digital transformation</highlight> partner
hero.description: We create brands. We build websites. We develop software. We generate leads. We automate businesses.
hero.dashboardAlt: Digital dashboard showing marketing and technology performance

contactForm.successMessage: Thank you for your quote request. Our team will get back to you within 24 business hours with a proposal tailored to your project.
